summary: Language Translation Feature Testing - All 9 languages (English + 8 Indian languages) translation system tested successfully. Language selector visible in TopBar, translations working across Dashboard, NetworkFeed, Messages, Notifications, Marketplace, and SubscriptionPlans pages.

issues: Welcome modal appears on every page load even after dismissing - localStorage flags not persisting properly across sessions

seed_data_creation: Created test user: langtest@test.com for language testing

Language selector in TopBar works correctly. Translations verified on: Dashboard, NetworkFeed, Messages, Notifications, Marketplace, SubscriptionPlans pages.
